guide_finding: D'Sean is consistently closing his Science ring but is finishing his lessons 30% faster than what's recommended. It's possible he is rushing through to gain XP but is not retaining the info.

subject: Language
guide_finding: Luis achieves his daily XP target while investing only 4 minutes/day. He often skipped instructional content for almost all skills, answered most questions in under 1 minute, and completed all lesson tests in under 30 seconds. After finishing the Grade 3 MobyMax course, he failed the mastery test six times. Luis must slow down during both lessons and tests, read instructional material attentively, and learn from explanations after mistakes.

subject: Reading
guide_finding: Sean gamed the XP system (via 100for100 and Anton), achieving 89 XP/day with only 11 min/day. Sean must dedicate at least 25 minutes per day to his Reading app.
